name: DetachManagedPolicyFromPermissionSetRequest
description: DetachManagedPolicyFromPermissionSetRequest schema from AWS IAM Identity Center

allOf.description: The ARN of the IAM Identity Center instance under which the operation will be executed. For more information about ARNs, see Amazon Resource Names (ARNs) and AWS Service Namespaces in the AWS General Reference.
The ARN of the PermissionSet from which the policy should be detached.
The AWS managed policy ARN to be detached from a permission set.
